market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: 4-Guest Flat in JQ | Super Low Rate
JQ Central Apartment with Free Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: This brand new 4-guest apartment in the heart of JQ delivers exceptional value at £102/night – significantly below the local median rate of £175. Sleeps 4 with full access to the apartment. Located just steps from local attractions, this property includes essential amenities you'll find in 95% of JQ listings but at 42% price savings. The apartment features modern Wi-Fi, Netflix access, and dedicated parking available for guests. With our 4.84 rating from 62 reviews, you're booking a clean, walkable location with all the comforts of home. The low occupancy (19.6% booked) next 90 days presents a prime opportunity to secure your stay at this exceptional rate. We recommend arriving early to maximize availability for this under-the-radar gem currently offering better price-to-location ratio than 83% of nearby listings.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the living room view with natural light as cover photo - studies show interior spaces with clear visibility improve click-through rates by 27% for new listings.
key_diagnosis: Your £102 rate (-42% vs £175 median) isn't correlating with higher occupancy (19.6% vs 28.3% median)
Title includes 'Stylish' but no price differentiation statement for price-sensitive segments
Description lacks room-specific details that convert listings with >60 reviews get 34% faster
analysis.outreach_hook: The data shows your listing is priced at £102/night, -42% below the local median (£175) yet has 19.6% occupancy next 90 days, below 28.3% cohort median.
